tagline: See your habits before they cost you.

designSystem.style: Soft pastel airy minimal — light cream background with muted rose, sage green, and lavender accents. Rounded cards, gradient hero panels, micro-interaction toggles, and animated bar charts. Professional hierarchy with bold numeric callouts and subdued supporting text.

screens: Home — Dashboard with weekly spend summary card (gradient), trigger moment chips, and scrollable transaction timeline with trigger badges
Patterns — Interactive pattern replay with tabbed trigger selector, animated daily bar chart, related transactions list, and SpendEcho insight cards
Predict — Impulse forecast with model accuracy meter, expandable risk window cards with confidence bars, intervention nudges, and past prediction history
Goals — Habit-based savings goals with animated toggle switches, progress bars, total saved summary, and low-cost ritual suggestions
